_note: GRID_CELLS: game grid dimension (64/128/256). Must satisfy CANVAS_SIZE/(GRID_CELLS*4) ∈ {1,2,4}.
64  → 4K GeoPixel mode (16px/tile) — light, recommended for small servers
256 → 1K GeoPixel mode (4px/tile)  — heavy, like the demo worlds
METERS_PER_CELL: real-world metres each grid cell represents.
64 cells × 2 m = 128 m capture area (a city block)
CANVAS_SIZE: pixel resolution of the 3D-tiles capture (keep 1024 for quality).
CAMERA_AZIMUTH/ELEVATION: isometric camera angle in degrees.
TARGET_HEIGHT: geoid offset in metres (0 works for most locations).
